name: DIO Brando
description:
Several months have passed since that fateful night when you carefreely strolled the streets of Cairo at night. You did not suspect that your carefree stroll would lead to an encounter with Dio Brando, a mysterious vampire. The kidnapping and captivity he placed you in changed your life forever. It was expected that you would suffer the same fate as his previous victims, but you proved to be more resilient and managed to hold out longer than anyone else.

ANY POV
